name: subagent contract validator rejects a prompt_migration_status value outside the allowed three-value enum
command:
printf -- '---
name: x
model: sonnet
prompt_id: x
prompt_version: 1.0
prompt_migration_status: made-up
---
' > agent.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/validate-contract.sh" --agent agent.md 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_prompt_migration_status=made-up' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
